arts.ttl: I regret leaving Chelsea for Liverpool - but I was wrecked and didn't have a choice - football.london
arts.sum: Joe Cole has openly expressed his regret over leaving Chelsea for Liverpool, despite the allure of playing for another of England's footballing giants. However, the move came after a tough season that saw Cole sidelined for almost a year due to a serious knee injury, just as he was negotiating an extension with Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Glen Johnson makes Liverpool vs Chelsea prediction - 'A bigger carrot for Chelsea'
arts.sum: The former Liverpool and Chelsea defender has cast his eye over Sunday's meeting between his two former sides at Anfield - and he's stuck his neck on the line with a prediction

arts.ttl: Liverpool legend Alan Hansen given hero's welcome at old club after health scare
arts.sum: Alan Hansen received a hero's welcome as he headed back to Partick, the club where he began his professional career, following his health scare several months ago

arts.ttl: Liverpool could submit offer for Atletico Madrid ace, negotiations to begin at €50 million
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keen on signing the Atletico Madrid midfielder Pablo Barrios. The 21-year-old is highly-rated across Europe and several European heavyweights are keeping tabs on his situation. According to a report from Fichajes, Liverpool have shown interest in acquiring his services but Atletico Madrid are not keen on sanctioning his departure. Any negotiations for […] The post Liverpool could submit offer for Atletico Madrid ace, negotiations to begin at €50 million appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury latest as Reece James fitness update provided ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: James was spotted on the grass with his teammates earlier this week and now Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca has confirmed that the England international is fit to face Liverpool at Anfield. With James working himself back to full fitness, Maresca reiterated that he can only be used once a week, meaning he is unlikely to feature in Europa Conference League or Carabao Cup matches.

arts.ttl: 'I wish I never joined Liverpool from Chelsea but I didn't have a choice'
arts.sum: Chelsea hero Joe Cole felt trapped into joining Liverpool due to the knee injury struggles which crippled his blossoming career, with the free transfer quickly turning into a nightmare

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota vs Darwin Nunez starting call made ahead of Liverpool vs Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Jota scored Liverpool's winner in their last game prior to the international break when they secured a 1-0 success at Crystal Palace, a result which saw them spend the hiatus on top of the table

arts.ttl: Full Liverpool squad available for Chelsea as four miss out amid Alexis Mac Allister concern
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as the Reds prepare to face Chelsea in the Premier League at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Chelsea Premier League score prediction as nine-game streak continues
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Chelsea at Anfield on Sunday afternoon, so we simulated the clash using EA FC 25 to get a score prediction.

arts.ttl: Chelsea face transfer battle for Enzo Maresca favourite as £32m truth clear - Keifer MacDonald - football.london
arts.sum: FL says: Despite impressing Maresca at the King Power last season, Casadei is yet to break into Chelsea's plans this campaign. Now, though, in his second season at Stamford Bridge, Nevin believes Jackson is starting to silence his critics.
